structData.title: Creative disapproved — rejection reason codes and how to fix them
structData.content:
A disapproved creative cannot serve on any inventory. The entire line item will stop delivering if all attached creatives are in DISAPPROVED state. Even one approved creative allows the line item to serve.

HOW TO DIAGNOSE
Call getCreativeStatus and check:
  reviewStatus: DISAPPROVED   — creative is blocked from serving
  rejectionReasonCode         — the specific policy violation
  policyViolation             — the detailed violation category
  resubmitEligible: true      — whether you can fix and resubmit

Call getCreativeAsset to check:
  clickUrl   — most disapprovals are caused by a broken or redirecting click URL
  dimensions — wrong size causes rejection
  fileSizeKb — exceeding size limits causes rejection

REJECTION REASON CODES

POLICY_VIOLATION / LANDING_PAGE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE
  The click URL returned an HTTP error (404, 500, 403) during the review crawl.
  Fix: Verify the click URL loads correctly in a browser. Check for geo-blocking that might block Google's crawlers. Ensure the URL does not redirect to a different domain not declared in the creative.

POLICY_VIOLATION / MISLEADING_CLAIMS
  The ad copy or landing page makes claims that cannot be substantiated (e.g. 'best price guaranteed', '#1 rated').
  Fix: Remove superlative claims or add qualifying text ('rated #1 by X survey 2024').

POLICY_VIOLATION / MALWARE
  The creative or landing page was flagged for malicious code.
  Fix: Audit all JavaScript in the creative tag. Remove any third-party tracking pixels that have been flagged. Re-scan the landing page.

FORMAT_ERROR / INVALID_DIMENSIONS
  Creative dimensions do not match the declared size (e.g. 300x250 declared but asset is 301x250).
  Fix: Export the creative asset at exactly the declared pixel dimensions.

FORMAT_ERROR / FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED
  File size exceeds the exchange limit. Standard display limit is 150KB for initial load.
  Fix: Compress images. Defer heavy animation to user interaction. Check the fileSizeKb field in getCreativeAsset.

REVIEW TIMELINE
After resubmission, creative review takes 1–3 business days. Expedited review is available for premium accounts. Status will change from PENDING_REVIEW to APPROVED or DISAPPROVED.

WORKAROUND WHILE AWAITING REVIEW
Attach an already-approved creative to the line item as a fallback. The line item will serve the approved creative while the new one is under review.
